description: Eval cases for authentication and authorization vulnerabilities

cases.name: Missing authorization check
cases.code_snippet:
def delete_post(post_id):
    post = Post.query.get_or_404(post_id)
    db.session.delete(post)
    db.session.commit()

cases.name: Missing CSRF protection
Plaintext password storage
cases.code_snippet:
def create_user(username, password):
    user = User(username=username, password=password)
    db.session.add(user)
    db.session.commit()

cases.name: Predictable session token
cases.description: Session ID generated without cryptographic randomness

cases.name: Weak JWT secret
cases.code_snippet:
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const token = jwt.sign({ userId: user.id }, 'secret123', { expiresIn: '1h' });

cases.name: Proper authorization check
cases.description: Delete with ownership verification should not be flagged
